long_description:
Need to check if PDNS servers were updated with new SNAT IPs  for below mentioned VPCs:
Non-prod VPC :
============
VPC Name : dMZR - NPR - ADC
VPC ID : r030-3cbe1d14-8920-4d85-a2bb-0e58e860f81f


Prod VPC :
========
VPC Name : dMZR - PRD - ADC
VPC ID : r030-8521bae4-b41e-4f6b-acf6-901e851ca93a

Please refer attached excel sheet for details
short_description: To check if  PDNS servers were updated for BNPP VPC's with the new  SNAT IP's
comment_list: [{"comment": "Primary PagerDuty Incident(Q2W51PR0OQ97CE) has been resolved. Resolving incident INC10473977", "added_by": "snowdev@us.ibm.com", "added_on": "2025-12-04T09:26:01Z"}, {"comment": "Resolving PagerDuty incident: PDE7708530/Q2W51PR0OQ97CE", "added_by": "system", "added_on": "2025-12-04T09:26:01Z"}, {"comment": "PagerDuty: Q2W51PR0OQ97CE/dns-svcs-operations-escalation-sev3-sev4 was resolved by ServiceNow Application", "added_by": "snowdev@us.ibm.com", "added_on": "2025-12-04T09:26:01Z"}, {"comment": "From PDNS side the new snatips are added successfully to the zones and iptozonelink documents are also created. As there are around 1225 zones couldnt check for all the zones but checked for the first 10zones. everything looks good from PDNS side. Attached is the evidences.", "added_by": "santhipriya.katakamsetty@ibm.com", "added_on": "2025-12-04T09:15:51Z"}, {"comment": "Attachment: [code]bnppsecondvpc-prod.docx[/code] has been attached by Santhipriya Katakamsetty", "added_by": "santhipriya.katakamsetty@ibm.com", "added_on": "2025-12-04T09:13:51Z"}]
